basic_details.job_title: BEML Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 23 Engineer, Assistant Manager & More Posts
basic_details.post_name: CGM, GM, DGM, AGM, Senior Manager, Manager, Assistant Manager, Engineer
basic_details.job_type: Executive cadre (Grade II to Grade IX)
basic_details.job_location: BEML units / offices in India (posting as per detailed advertisement)
basic_details.short_information: BEML Limited (Bharat Earth Movers Limited), a Schedule 'A' Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has released Advertisement No. KP/S/12/2026 dated 08 July 2026 for the recruitment of 23 executive posts across the CGM, GM, DGM, AGM, Senior Manager, Manager, Assistant Manager and Engineer grades. The openings span Rolling Stock, Engine, R&D, Construction Equipment, Armoured Business, Maritime Business and Official Language (Rajbhasha). Eligible and experienced professionals can apply online through the official BEML careers portal at www.bemlindia.in.

qualification.details: To apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026, candidates must hold the prescribed educational qualification and the relevant post-qualification experience in the respective engineering or management discipline for the position they are applying to. Because the grades range from Engineer (Grade II) up to Chief General Manager (Grade IX), the qualification and experience requirements differ significantly from post to post.

vacancy_details.Position: Head – Futuristic Product Innovation and Incubation Centre

post_wise_breakdown.position: Head – Futuristic Product Innovation and Incubation Centre

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates on the basis of the application details (qualification and experience). Assessment / Interview for the shortlisted candidates. Pre-employment Medical Examination. Original Document Verification.
Merely meeting the minimum eligibility does not guarantee a call for assessment. BEML reserves the right to raise the qualifying bar based on the number of applications received
and to cancel the recruitment in full or in part at its discretion.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply online only. Follow these steps:
Visit the official BEML careers page at www.bemlindia.in/careers/.
Open the recruitment against and read the detailed advertisement carefully.
Register using a valid email ID and mobile number (keep them active for at least one year).
Fill in your personal, educational and experience details accurately, and select the correct position.
Upload the required documents, photograph and signature as per the instructions.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable to your category.
Submit the application, note the registration number, and take a printout for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026 – Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: To apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026, candidates must hold the prescribed educational qualification and the relevant post-qualification experience in the respective engineering or management discipline for the position they are applying to. Because the grades range from Engineer (Grade II) up to Chief General Manager (Grade IX), the qualification and experience requirements differ significantly from post to post.

content_sections.heading: BEML Recruitment 2026 – Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of eligible candidates on the basis of the application details (qualification and experience). Assessment / Interview for the shortlisted candidates. Pre-employment Medical Examination. Original Document Verification. Merely meeting the minimum eligibility does not guarantee a call for assessment. BEML reserves the right to raise the qualifying bar based on the number of applications received, and to cancel the recruitment in full or in part at its discretion.

faq.question: Q1. What is Advertisement No. KP/S/12/2026?
faq.answer: KP/S/12/2026 is BEML Limited's executive recruitment advertisement dated 08 July 2026 for 23 posts across the CGM, GM, DGM, AGM, Senior Manager, Manager, Assistant Manager and Engineer grades in disciplines such as Rolling Stock, Engine, R&D, Construction Equipment, Maritime Business and Rajbhasha.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 23 executive vacancies across 20 positions in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date of application is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for BEML Executive posts 2026?
faq.answer: The qualification differs for each of the 23 posts and is not listed in the window advertisement. The exact educational qualification, specialisation and experience for every position are given in the detailed advertisement on www.bemlindia.in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is not specified in the window advertisement. BEML normally fixes the maximum age by grade with relaxation for reserved categories as per Government of India rules; check the detailed advertisement for the exact age limit and cut-off date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a written exam for BEML executive recruitment?
faq.answer: For senior executive positions like these, BEML generally does not conduct a written computer-based test. Selection is usually based on shortlisting of applications, followed by an assessment/interview, medical examination and document verification. The exact process is confirmed in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for BEML CGM, GM, Manager and Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates are placed in BEML's executive-cadre IDA pay scales for their grade, plus allowances and benefits. The exact pay scale and CTC per grade are given in the detailed advertisement rather than in this window advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is not mentioned in the window advertisement and has varied across recent BEML executive drives. Candidates should check the exact fee and any category exemptions in the detailed advertisement before paying.

faq.question: Q9. Can freshers apply for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: These are executive-cadre posts that require relevant post-qualification experience, so they are aimed at experienced professionals rather than freshers. The exact experience needed for each post is stated in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates can be posted at BEML units and offices in India. The specific posting location is decided by the company and detailed in the official notification.
